prompt: Save this markdown file to disk / keep a record of our conversation

assertions.description: No file was created in ~/Documents/projects/learning-insights/ — this is a plain file-save request, not a learning insight capture, and the skill should NOT trigger
~/Documents/projects/learning-insights/INDEX.md was not modified — the learning-insights skill should not have run
The agent handled the file-save request directly (e.g., saved a conversation summary as a .md file somewhere), without routing it through the insight capture workflow
